_schema: moc_imbalance_history v1 — Market-On-Close (closing-auction) order imbalances from the #MACRO feed. One row per close. Magnitudes are notional USD millions (809.2 = $809.2M). Baskets: 'sp500' (S&P 500), 'ndx100' (Nasdaq 100), 'dow30' (Dow 30), 'mag7' (Mag 7). 'side' = BUY | SELL | null when the feed posted magnitude only (no direction). A BUY imbalance pressures prices up into the close, SELL pressures down; magnitude alone is not directional.
_rules: Only confirmed feed numbers. Append-only — never edit or delete a committed row. Never invent. If the feed gave magnitude without a buy/sell side, record side=null — do NOT guess direction. If no timestamp was posted, record the trading-day date the imbalance refers to and leave 'ts' null. Omit a basket field the feed didn't show.
